summary: Full backend + frontend testing of LeadOrbit CRM. 28/28 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend login, role-based sidebar, admin vs executive lead isolation, lead drawer with Justdial button, auto welcome WhatsApp, notes, reassignment, and logout all verified end-to-end via Playwright. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1116 lines — recommend splitting into modules (auth.py, leads.py, webhooks.py, reports.py, assignment.py) for maintainability.
auto_reassign_task runs every 60s via APScheduler in-process; if multiple backend workers are deployed the task will multi-fire. Consider leader-election or an external scheduler.
Justdial endpoint /api/ingest/justdial is public (no auth). In production this should be HMAC-signed or IP-restricted to avoid ingestion abuse.

Duplicate-detection key in /ingest/justdial uses content hash + timestamp; legitimate re-sends with identical content collapse, but the endpoint response always sets duplicate=false (line 859: `lead.get('dedup_hash') == dhash and False`) — the `and False` makes the flag always False regardless of actual duplicate state. Minor API response inconsistency.
login cookie has secure=False; acceptable for preview but should be secure=True in production HTTPS config.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login — spec mentions 5-fail lockout but not implemented. If required by playbook, add.
test_credentials: admin/Admin@123 (admin), ravi/Exec@123 and priya/Exec@123 (executives) — all verified working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded users + created TEST_* prefixed leads via /api/webhooks/indiamart and one Justdial Shoba lead via /api/ingest/justdial.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, role guards, users CRUD, IndiaMART webhook with round-robin, Justdial parser + dedup, leads isolation + notes + opened_at, WhatsApp send + auto-welcome, templates CRUD, followups, routing rules, reports, and WhatsApp webhook verify + inbound. All 28 tests pass against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend verified: Login → Dashboard → Leads (admin 20 leads, exec ravi 10) → LeadDrawer (Justdial badge + 'Open Justdial Lead' button visible for contact_link leads, WA panel works, welcome_lead auto-message rendered). Admin-only nav items (Users, Routing, Templates, Reports) correctly hidden for exec, and /users redirects exec back to /dashboard. No JS console errors.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs to investigate. The only cosmetic issue is the `duplicate` flag in /ingest/justdial response being hard-coded to False due to `and False` expression; behaviour is harmless (lead is still correctly dedup'd) but flag is misleading.
